goal: 给 Catty v0 持久 prediction 增加受控 judge CLI

summary.title: 接入持久 prediction 手动打分入口
summary.what: 为 Catty v0 新增受控 judge-record CLI：它从 Catty SQLite store 选择指定或最新未打分 prediction，从真实 raw_events 读取 prediction 之后的 actual trail，默认使用 StubJudge dry-run，只在显式 --write 时把 judgement / actualTrail 写回 catty_predictions。配套补了 focused 测试、README 说明、actual trail loader，并让 SqliteCattyStore 支持 dry-run 只读打开，避免无写入模式补建 schema。
summary.why: 前序切片已经完成真实 trail 输入、独立 judge seam、纯内存 runtime、SQLite prediction store 和手动 shadow CLI；要让 v0 更接近真实 dogfood，下一步需要能把已持久化的 shadow prediction 对照后续真实行为打分并可选择写回，同时保持默认无模型调用、无 live DB 写入的受控边界。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 持久 prediction 增加受控 judge CLI

decisions.chose: 补持久 prediction 的手动 judge CLI，而不是直接接 heartbeat 调度。
decisions.rationale: 手动入口能先验证 prediction -> actual trail -> independent judge -> judgement writeback 的闭环，避免把模型成本、调度和污染控制一起引入 60s heartbeat。

decisions.chose: 默认 dry-run + StubJudge，只有 --write 写回，只有 --pi 调真实 judge 模型。
decisions.rationale: v0 需要降低污染和成本风险；prediction/judgement 属于评估数据，写入必须显式。

decisions.chose: 新增 loadActualTrailFromEventsDb，只读取 source=observer/action=active_focus 且 ts > prediction.context.now 的 raw_events。
decisions.rationale: judge 必须锚定 prediction 之后的真实后续行为，且不读取 payload_json 或 secret-bearing config。

decisions.chose: SqliteCattyStore 增加 readonly/ensureSchema 选项，judge-record dry-run 以只读方式列出 prediction。
decisions.rationale: dry-run 不应写 judgement，也不应为了读取 prediction 补建无关 schema；测试已覆盖 drop catty_memory_audit 后 dry-run 不重建。

decisions.chose: 把 int_5b87e237、int_d0d9d89f、int_89989c5b、int_2dd4c8cc、int_d2f08a4a 视为同一 Catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 这些 intent 分别完成 trail、judge seam、runtime、store、shadow CLI；本轮建立在它们之上，不反向改变其核心决策，不是语义冲突。

rejected.alternative: 把 judgement 写回接进 launchd heartbeat
rejected.reason: 会让每 60 秒运行路径承担模型/写库/污染控制风险，超出本轮最小可验证切片。

rejected.alternative: dry-run 也用可写 store 打开并确保 schema
rejected.reason: 会留下非 judgement 的 DB side effect，不符合受控 dry-run 语义。

rejected.alternative: 把 prediction judgement 直接写成 user memory
rejected.reason: v0 边界要求 prediction/judgement 是评估数据，真正 user-prior memory 仍要经过 memory admission / canary。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test，19 pass，96 expect。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/judge-record.test.ts src/catty/shadow.test.ts src/catty/sqlite-store.test.ts src/catty/trail.test.ts，8 pass，45 expect。
验证通过：git diff --check 与 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/judge-record.ts --help 输出预期 usage。
临时 SQLite CLI smoke：dry-run 读取 2 条 actual trail 且 persisted=false；随后 --write persisted=true；读回 record 显示 judged=true、actualTrailEvents=2、source=stub-judge。
TDD RED/GREEN：新增 dry-run 不补建 catty_memory_audit 的断言先失败，改为 readonly store 后通过。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat loaded，not running between cycles，last observe ok，full pipeline throttled 且 last full pipeline ok。
提交 cdd4656 只包含本轮 5 个 Catty 文件；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty，未 stage、未提交。

subsystems: Catty v0 SQLite store read/write boundary
Agent Memory raw_events actual trail input
architectural_claims: Persisted prediction judgement now has a manual, controlled entrypoint before any heartbeat scheduling is introduced.
judge-record keeps offline/evaluation data separate from admitted user-prior memory; it writes only judgement and actualTrail back to prediction records.
Dry-run judgement reads existing catty_predictions through a read-only SqliteCattyStore path and does not create or mutate Catty schema.
Actual trail loading is based on observer active_focus events after the original prediction context timestamp, preserving judge anchoring to later real behavior.
PiJudge remains opt-in behind --pi; default CLI execution makes no model call.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/judge-record.ts dry-runs the latest unjudged persisted prediction and prints judgement JSON without persistence.
bun src/catty/judge-record.ts --write persists actualTrail and judgement to catty_predictions.
--record-id selects a specific prediction; without it the command picks the latest unjudged prediction.
Already judged records are rejected unless --force is passed.
--db controls the raw_events source; --store-db controls the Catty prediction store and defaults to --db.
loadActualTrailFromEventsDb returns active_focus events after a timestamp in ascending order.
security_implications: Default judge-record path uses StubJudge and does not read model credentials.
--pi uses existing PiJudge env-only credential behavior and does not hard-code or print secrets.
Actual trail loader reads selected raw_events columns only and does not read payload_json or ~/.agents/memory/config.json.
Dry-run opens the Catty store read-only and avoids live DB schema writes.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; write mode reuses existing SqliteCattyStore lazy CREATE TABLE behavior.
Existing SqliteCattyStore constructor calls remain compatible because options are optional.
Existing prediction/shadow CLI behavior is unchanged.
